summary.zh: 5 位用艺术打动世界的人
summary.en: Five who touched the world with art and words

sections.zh: 李白是中国唐朝最有名的诗人之一，人称「诗仙」。
sections.en: Li Bai was one of the most famous poets of China's Tang dynasty.

sections.zh: 他喜欢游山玩水，写下许多优美的诗。
sections.en: He loved to travel among mountains and rivers, writing many beautiful poems.

sections.zh: 他的诗到今天还被小朋友们朗朗背诵。
sections.en: Children still recite his poems happily today.

sections.zh: 王羲之是中国古代最伟大的书法家，被称为「书圣」。
sections.en: Wang Xizhi was ancient China's greatest calligrapher, the Sage of Calligraphy.

sections.zh: 他从小苦练写字，传说把一池水都洗笔洗黑了。
sections.en: He practiced writing so much that, legend says, he turned a whole pond black washing his brush.

sections.zh: 他写的字优美流畅，成为后人学习书法的榜样。
sections.en: His graceful writing became the model that calligraphers still study today.

sections.zh: 莎士比亚是英国最伟大的剧作家。
sections.en: William Shakespeare was England's greatest playwright.

sections.zh: 他写了很多戏剧和诗歌，故事里有国王、小丑和精灵。
sections.en: He wrote many plays and poems full of kings, clowns, and fairies.

sections.zh: 四百多年后，他的戏剧仍在世界各地上演。
sections.en: More than 400 years later, his plays are still performed all over the world.

sections.zh: 贝多芬是德国伟大的音乐家。
sections.en: Ludwig van Beethoven was a great German composer.

sections.zh: 后来他的耳朵听不见了，却仍然坚持作曲。
sections.en: Later he lost his hearing, but he kept on writing music anyway.

sections.zh: 他创作了许多动人的乐曲，至今还在世界各地演奏。
sections.en: He wrote many moving pieces that are still played everywhere today.

sections.zh: 梵高是荷兰著名的画家。
sections.en: Vincent van Gogh was a famous painter from the Netherlands.

sections.zh: 他用明亮的颜色和大胆的笔触画出星空和向日葵。
sections.en: He painted starry skies and sunflowers with bright colors and bold strokes.

sections.zh: 他的画如今被全世界的人喜爱和欣赏。
sections.en: His paintings are loved and admired by people all over the world today.
